role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained within script/language analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, soil color, and vegetation types consistent with the role.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant species (palms, scrub) and soil associations without drifting into architecture.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road surface and infrastructure standards (or lack thereof) appropriately.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (water tanks, brick styles) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Brazil. The agents provided high-quality, image-grounded evidence, particularly the meta agent's identification of the 'caixa d'água' and the landscape/botanics agents' focus on the specific red soil and vegetation. The tournament effectively used this evidence to eliminate distractors.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of red soil and flat terrain match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of palms and scrub match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of the unpaved road match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Descriptions of the water tank and brickwork match the image.
